name: Peanut Butter Banana Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bananas in an 8-inch round baking dish.
2. Add lemon juice and cinnamon, stirring lightly to coat the fruit.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour and brown sugar; cut in peanut butter and butter until the mixture is crumbly.
4. Sprinkle the crumbly mixture over the bananas.
5. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes.
6. Serve with whipped cream if desired.
Makes 6 servings.
